verse_text: In the middle of its street, and on either side of the river, was the tree of life, which bore twelve fruits, each tree yielding its fruit every month. The leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.

links.context: Christ is the living water ([[JOH.4:10]]-14). In the Apocalypse, a river runs through the Holy City ([[REV.22:1]]-5). The Garden of Eden was at the headwaters of four great rivers ([[GEN.2:10]]-15). In the garden of Paradise, Christ is the living water who sustains, refreshes, and gives life to the inhabitants.
